name: Mushroom-Stuffed Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 8 Chicken breast halves, pounded flat and boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Melt 4 tablespoons of the butter in a skillet over medium heat.
3. Add mushrooms, salt, and pepper, and cook, stirring often, until the mushrooms turn very dark and absorb all the butter.
4. Remove from the heat and stir in 3/4 cup of bread crumbs and nutmeg (if using).
5. Divide the mushroom stuffing into 8 portions and place a portion in the center of each chicken breast half.
6. Fold the chicken around the stuffing, ensuring the seam side is down, and place in a buttered shallow baking dish.
7. Melt the remaining tablespoon of butter over the chicken.
8. Sprinkle with the remaining 3/4 cup of bread crumbs.
9. Pour on cream and broth.
10. Bake for 30 minutes or until lightly brown.
